config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama, karena kalau kepentingan masyarakat selalu ditempatkan di atas semuanya, mudah sekali dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap minoritas atau orang yang tidak punya suara. Dari pengalaman saya melihat kehidupan di Indonesia, kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai tanpa mengorbankan kebebasan dasar dan martabat tiap orang. Masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun ketika hak individu dilindungi, lalu kepentingan umum dirundingkan secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically take priority over the individual, because that can easily become an excuse to silence minorities and excuse abuse of power. From my perspective as someone from China, I do value social stability and collective responsibility, and I understand why many people here put group interests first, especially in times of crisis. But I also think that if individual rights are too weak, then “the interests of society” can be defined by whoever has authority, not by the people as a whole. A healthy society needs a balance: collective goals matter, but they should not override basic rights and dignity without very strong justification.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu secara umum. Di Indonesia, saya melihat alasan “demi kepentingan bersama” sering dipakai untuk menekan suara kecil, padahal justru dari perlindungan hak individu kita bisa mencegah kekuasaan disalahgunakan atas nama mayoritas. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi posisinya harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, bukan menjadi kartu truf yang selalu menang. Kalau tidak, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat bisa berubah menjadi kepentingan pihak yang paling berkuasa, bukan kepentingan semua orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the claim that society should generally outrank the individual, because in practice that often turns into power speaking in the name of the public. Coming from China, I understand why many people emphasize collective order, social harmony, and crisis response, and I do not dismiss those values at all. But I have also seen how easily “the interests of society” can become a vague slogan used to pressure dissent, and once that happens, ordinary people lose the protection they need. For me, the right position is that collective interests matter, but they must be constrained by firm individual rights, especially when the majority or the authorities say otherwise.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari kacamata saya di Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membungkam kritik, menekan minoritas, atau membenarkan tindakan sewenang-wenang oleh mayoritas maupun penguasa. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi justru harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar agar tidak berubah menjadi alat kekuasaan. Kalau hak individu tidak dijaga, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat bisa saja hanya kepentingan pihak yang paling kuat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not be treated as automatically higher than the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people value order, harmony, and collective responsibility, because those can really matter in daily life and especially during emergencies. But I also do not trust the phrase “the interests of society” unless it is clearly limited, because it can easily become a tool for authorities or majorities to silence dissent and ignore minority rights. A society is not truly healthy if it protects abstract collective goals while leaving individual dignity and basic rights vulnerable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
